summary: Naaman is healed of leprosy while Gehazi's greed brings the disease upon himself (ch. 5); Elisha's servant sees the horses and chariots of fire, and a blinded Syrian army is spared and sent home (ch. 6); a starving Samaria is delivered when four lepers discover the abandoned Syrian camp (ch. 7); and the Shunammite woman's land is restored just as Hazael murders Ben-hadad to seize the throne of Syria (ch. 8).
